/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/pbv_hmi.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/pbv_hmi.dir/pbv_hmi_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pbv_hmi.dir/hmi/hmi_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pbv_hmi.dir/hmi/hmi_window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pbv_hmi.dir/hmi_pages/idle_page.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pbv_hmi.dir/hmi_pages/module_a_page.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pbv_hmi.dir/hmi_pages/module_b_page.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pbv_hmi.dir/common/telemetry_client.cpp.o -o pbv_hmi  /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Charts.so.6.8.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Network.so.6.8.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6OpenGLWidgets.so.6.8.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.8.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.8.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.8.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.8.2
